messages.content: translate and rewrite this in a short, formal, concise style: 长春市蓝奥光电子有限公司坐落于著名的光学基地——长春，是集产品研发、生产、销售为一体的综合性公司，目前公司我公司现有专业研发人员33人，其中高级工程师2人，技术人员16人，工艺专家15人。我司自主研发高分辨率工业相机、工业镜头，安防镜头，机器视觉光源等产品，在国际市场上深受客户喜爱

Longcheer Optoelectronics Co., Ltd., located in the renowned optical base of Changchun, is a comprehensive company that integrates product research and development, production, and sales. Our company currently has 33 professional research and development personnel, including 2 senior engineers, 16 technicians, and 15 process experts. We independently research and develop high-resolution industrial cameras, industrial lenses, security lenses, machine vision light sources, and other products, which are highly favored by customers in the international market.

translate this: 公司地址
长春新区北湖科技开发区航空街
与丙八十一交汇西行300米

Company Address:
300 meters west of the intersection of Aviation Street and B81, Beihu Science and Technology Development Zone, Changchun New Area.
translate: 做最受客户信赖的企业
To be the most trusted enterprise by customers.
more naturally
To become the enterprise that customers trust the most.
translate this: 应用案例：核酸检测试剂盒的缺陷检测
Application Case: Defect detection of nucleic acid testing reagent kits.
translate: 应用案例：汽车零部件的焊接件检测
Application Case: Welding component inspection of automotive parts.
translate: 应用案例：视觉引导拆码垛系统
Application Case: Visual guided dismantling and stacking system.
more accurate
Application Case: Visual-guided decoding and stacking system.
translate: 我们的优势--半导体/集成电路行业
Our Advantage - Semiconductor/Integrated Circuit Industry.
translate this: 应用案例：半导体 SOP 封装检测

more accurate
Application Case: Inspection of Semiconductor SOP (Small Outline Package) Encapsulation.
